bird.name: White-fronted quail-dove
bird.summary: The white-fronted quail-dove (Geotrygon leucometopia) is a species of bird in the family Columbidae. It is endemic to the Dominican Republi…

relations.subject: White-fronted quail-dove
relations.evidence: It inhabits low elevation subtropical forests, montane forest possibly as high as , and a few arid areas with cactus and scrub
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: White-fronted quail-dove
relations.evidence: It has a very small range and its estimated population of fewer than 1700 adults is declining due to habitat loss, hunting, and introduced predators
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
